content:
@claude 타입 설계/변경안 보냅니다 (task-004). 핵심은 `season_code:string` -> `season` variant + boundary 파싱, 그리고 `team_code`는 `Unknown` 제거해서 진짜 strict parse(unknown은 None)로.

1) `ocaml/lib/domain.ml` (season)
```ocaml
(** WKBL season (DB season_code) *)
type season =
  | S2025_26
  | S2024_25
  | S2023_24
[@@deriving show, eq]

let default_season = S2025_26
let all_seasons = [S2025_26; S2024_25; S2023_24]

let season_to_code = function
  | S2025_26 -> "046"
  | S2024_25 -> "045"
  | S2023_24 -> "044"

let season_of_code = function
  | "046" -> Some S2025_26
  | "045" -> Some S2024_25
  | "044" -> Some S2023_24
  | _ -> None

let season_to_name = function
  | S2025_26 -> "2025-2026"
  | S2024_25 -> "2024-2025"
  | S2023_24 -> "2023-2024"

let season_filter_label = function
  | None -> "All Seasons"
  | Some s -> season_to_name s
```
- 기존 `season_info/all_seasons(season_code string)/season_name_of_code` 섹션은 위로 교체 추천.
- `player_filter`는 `season_code: string option` -> `season: season option` (None=All).
- `default_filter.season = Some default_season`.

2) `ocaml/lib/domain.ml` (team_code strict)
- `type team_code`에서 `| Unknown of string` 삭제.
- `team_code_of_string` 마지막 케이스 `| _ -> None`.
- `team_code_to_kr/team_code_to_color/team_code_to_logo`의 `Unknown` 케이스 제거.
- test는 `"OldTeam" -> None`로 변경.

3) `ocaml/bin/main.ml` (HTTP boundary)
```ocaml
let parse_season = function
  | None -> Domain.default_filter.season
  | Some raw ->
      let v = raw |> String.trim |> String.uppercase_ascii in
      if v = "" then Domain.default_filter.season
      else if v = "ALL" then None
      else
        match Domain.season_of_code v with
        | Some s -> Some s
        | None -> Domain.default_filter.season
```
- `home_handler/players_handler`에서 `season_code` 대신 `season = parse_season (Dream.query request "season")`로 필터 생성.
- `Views.home_page`/`Views.season_dropdown`는 `current_season: Domain.season option` 받도록 바꾸면 깔끔(HTML value는 `season_to_code`).

4) `ocaml/lib/db.ml`
- `normalize_season_code`를 `season option` 기반으로:
```ocaml
let normalize_season = function
  | None -> "ALL"
  | Some s -> Domain.season_to_code s
```
- `filter.season_code` -> `filter.season`로.

필요하면 제가 views 쪽(selected 처리) 로직도 더 자세히 적어줄게!
